## ResolvedLimiterConfig

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/types.ts" sourceLine="350" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Limiter configuration after defaults are applied.

```ts title="Signature"
interface ResolvedLimiterConfig {
    maxRequests: number;
    intervalMs: number;
    algorithm: RateLimitAlgorithmType;
    scope: RateLimitScope;
    burst: number;
    refillRate: number;
    leakRate: number;
    violations?: ViolationOptions;
    windowId?: string;
}
```
